rss_news.title: [RSS] Scaling Codex to enterprises worldwide
rss_news.summary: OpenAI launches Codex Labs, partners with with Accenture, PwC, Infosys, and others to help enterprises deploy and scale Codex across the software development lifecycle, and hits 4M Codex WAU.

rss_news.title: [RSS] Meta will record employees’ keystrokes and use it to train its AI models
rss_news.summary: Meta says that it has a new internal tool that is converting mouse movements and button clicks into data that can train its AI models.

rss_news.title: [RSS] Unauthorized group has gained access to Anthropic’s exclusive cyber tool Mythos, report claims
rss_news.summary: Anthropic told TechCrunch it is investigating the claims, but maintains that there is no evidence that its systems have been impacted.

rss_news.title: [RSS] SpaceX is working with Cursor and has an option to buy the startup for $60B
rss_news.summary: The move could shore up weaknesses at each company, but it also reveals them. Neither Cursor nor xAI has proprietary models that can match the leading offerings from Anthropic and OpenAI — the same companies now competing directly with Cursor for the developer market.

rss_news.summary: Apple's top job comes with almost unrivaled power and money, but it comes with plenty of baggage, too.

final_report:
# AI Intelligence Report: Data Grabs, Security Breaches, and the Race for Foundational AI Today's AI landscape is marked by aggressive data acquisition strategies, critical security challenges, and a relentless pursuit of both foundational understanding and practical deployment solutions. From corporate data ethics to cutting-edge research, the industry is navigating complex terrain at an accelerating pace. ## 🏢 AI Business & Strategy ### **[Meta will record employees’ keystrokes and use it to train its AI models](https://techcrunch.com/2026/04/21/meta-will-record-employees-keystrokes-and-use-it-to-train-its-ai-models/)** Meta's move to convert employee mouse movements and keystrokes into AI training data signals an aggressive push for proprietary data, highlighting the intense competition for unique datasets. While potentially offering a competitive edge in model development, this strategy raises significant privacy concerns and could invite scrutiny from employees and regulators alike, impacting corporate reputation and trust. ### **[Unauthorized group has gained access to Anthropic’s exclusive cyber tool Mythos, report claims](https://techcrunch.com/2026/04/21/unauthorized-group-has-gained-access-to-anthropics-exclusive-cyber-tool-mythos-report-claims/)** Reports of an unauthorized group accessing Anthropic's exclusive cyber tool, Mythos, underscore the critical security vulnerabilities inherent in advanced AI systems. For business leaders, this incident highlights the paramount importance of robust cybersecurity measures for AI products, as breaches can severely erode trust, compromise sensitive data, and impact competitive positioning in the rapidly evolving AI market. ### **[SpaceX is working with Cursor and has an option to buy the startup for $60B](https://techcrunch.com/2026/04/21/spacex-is-working-with-cursor-and-has-an-option-to-buy-the-startup-for-60-billion/)** SpaceX's potential acquisition of Cursor for a staggering $60 billion, following its collaboration with xAI, reveals a strategic consolidation play to bolster its AI capabilities. This move indicates a recognition that even industry giants need to acquire specialized talent and technology to compete with leading AI model developers like Anthropic and OpenAI, signaling a continued trend of high-value M&A in the AI sector. ### **[Meta to start capturing employee mouse movements, keystrokes for AI training](https://www.reuters.com/sustainability/boards-policy-regulation/meta-start-capturing-employee-mouse-movements-keystrokes-ai-training-data-2026-04-21/)** This corroborating report from Reuters reinforces the strategic significance and potential controversy surrounding Meta's internal data collection practices. Business leaders should note the broad public and media attention this garners, indicating that such aggressive data strategies will face intense scrutiny regarding ethics, privacy, and employee relations. ### **[Claude Code to be removed from Anthropic's Pro plan?](https://bsky.app/profile/edzitron.com/post/3mjzxwfx3qs2a)** The rumored removal of "Claude Code" from Anthropic's Pro plan suggests a potential strategic shift in product offerings or a re-evaluation of core features. Executives and investors should monitor such changes closely, as they can impact developer adoption, competitive positioning, and the overall value proposition of a leading AI platform. ## 🛠️ AI Architects & Developers ### **[CrabTrap: An LLM-as-a-judge HTTP proxy to secure agents in production](https://www.brex.com/crabtrap)** CrabTrap introduces a practical and innovative solution for securing LLM-powered agents in production environments by leveraging an LLM itself as a judge. Developers should *watch* this tool closely as it offers a promising approach to mitigate risks and ensure the safe deployment of AI agents, addressing a critical need for robust guardrails in agentic workflows. ### **[19 Claude Opus 4.7 Insights You Wouldn’t Get From the Headlines](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=QVJcdfkRpH8)** This YouTube video promises a deep dive into Claude Opus 4.7, offering nuanced insights beyond surface-level news. Engineers and practitioners should *watch* this content to gain a more comprehensive understanding of Claude Opus's capabilities and limitations, enabling them to optimize its use in their projects and unlock its full potential. ## 🔬 Research Frontiers ### **[Generalization at the Edge of Stability](http://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19740v1)** This paper explores the intriguing phenomenon of neural networks achieving strong generalization when trained with large learning rates, operating at the "edge of stability." Researchers should delve into this work to better understand the complex optimization dynamics that lead to effective model performance, potentially guiding the development of more robust and efficient training methodologies. ### **[Phase Transitions in the Fluctuations of Functionals of Random Neural Networks](http://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19738v1)** This theoretical work establishes central and non-central limit theorems for functionals of infinitely-wide random neural networks, revealing phase transitions in their asymptotic behavior. Academics will find this crucial for advancing the foundational understanding of neural network statistics, which can inform future architectural designs and theoretical guarantees for deep learning models. ### **[Safe Continual Reinforcement Learning in Non-stationary Environments](http://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19737v1)** This research addresses the critical challenge of enabling reinforcement learning agents to adapt safely and continuously in dynamic, non-stationary environments. For deep-tech thinkers, this work is vital for developing truly robust and reliable autonomous systems that can operate effectively and safely in real-world, unpredictable conditions. ### **[UniT: Toward a Unified Physical Language for Human-to-Humanoid Policy Learning and World Modeling](http://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19734v1)** UniT proposes a novel approach to bridge the "cross-embodiment chasm" by creating a unified physical language to transfer policies from human data to humanoid robots. This is a significant step towards scaling humanoid foundation models by leveraging abundant human egocentric data, offering a promising path for more capable and versatile robotic systems. ### **[FASTER: Value-Guided Sampling for Fast RL](http://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19730v1)** FASTER introduces a value-guided sampling method to significantly reduce the computational expense of high-performing reinforcement learning algorithms. Researchers will find this paper impactful for developing more efficient RL techniques, making complex algorithms more practical for real-world applications and accelerating the pace of experimentation. --- **Today's Signal**: The drive for competitive advantage in AI is intensifying, pushing boundaries in data collection, strategic partnerships, and the fundamental understanding of intelligent systems. --- ## 📚 Raw Intelligence Index > All sources gathered during this run. Collapsed by default.
